items.title: NAACP sues Elon Musk's xAI, alleging illegal operation of gas turbines
items.summary: The NAACP announced its intention to sue xAI and MZX in February because the Clean Air Act requires 60 days of notice ahead of filing a lawsuit
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Paytm becomes majority Indian-owned and controlled company
items.summary: The shift marks a structural change in ownership for the fintech firm, with domestic shareholding rising steadily in recent quarters, reflecting growing investor confidence.
